summary: This weekend's Barron's cover story discusses whether Ford can be fixed and its stock can double.

headline: One To Watch: Competitor To Tesla's Ultracapacitor Company Raises $48M After Hinting At IPO
summary: Skeleton Technologies is not a publicly traded company, but it's one to keep an eye on as it traverses territory partly claimed by Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA).

headline: How To Invest Like David Einhorn
summary:
David Einhorn is well known in the financial markets as an activist investor and notable short seller.

Einhorn is public with his positions and not afraid to put pressure on companies to make changes to improve shareholder returns.

Long-Short Method: The usual way to invest like Einhorn is to use the long-short equity method.

headline: Notable Insider Buys in the Past Week: Biglari, Coty, Danaher, Foot Locker And More
summary:
Insider buying can be an encouraging signal for potential investors when markets face uncertainty.
	This past week, some insiders add to their stakes in a retailer, a beauty products maker and a couple of conglomerates.
	A couple of biopharmaceutical companies saw insiders acquiring some shares as well.

headline: A Pandemic Black Friday: PlayStation 5 Buyers Camp Out At Stores That Are Otherwise Much Emptier
summary: The number of people who went to traditional stores this year fell by 52.1% compared to last year, according to preliminary data from Sensormatic Solutions.

headline: Attention Biotech Investors: Mark Your Calendar For December PDUFA Dates
summary: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration's approval machinery churned out a lot of disappointments in November. Most of the negative verdicts were tied to difficulties the agency has had in inspecting facilities where investigational drugs are being manufactured, amid COVID-19-related restrictions.

headline: Tesla Might Have 'Wider Beta' In Two Weeks, Elon Musk Says
summary: What Happened: Replying to a user’s question about the “Full Self Driving” software beta in Minnesota, Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk said that the company might go to a wider beta in approximately two weeks.

headline: Former Zappos CEO Tony Hsieh Dies At 46
summary: Tony Hsieh, the former CEO of Zappos, has died.
